vibe: High-speed racing, Cyberpunk, NFS Underground, F1 telemetry, Neon glow, Energetic, Fast

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl tracking-tighter uppercase italic font-black

layout_spacing.alignment: Strict geometric alignments. Centered main navigation menu.

buttons.primary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#FF1E1E] text-[#FF1E1E] uppercase font-bold tracking-widest hover:bg-[#FF1E1E] hover:text-white transition-all duration-200 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,30,30,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,30,30,0.8)] [clip-path:polygon(15px_0,100%_0,calc(100%-15px)_100%,0_100%)] px-8 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#00C2FF] text-[#00C2FF] uppercase font-bold tracking-widest hover:bg-[#00C2FF] hover:text-white transition-all duration-200 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,194,255,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,194,255,0.8)] [clip-path:polygon(0_0,calc(100%-15px)_0,100%_100%,15px_100%)] px-8 py-3

cards.base: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 relative overflow-hidden group rounded-none
cards.decorative_corner: absolute top-0 right-0 w-8 h-8 bg-gradient-to-bl from-[#FF1E1E]/50 to-transparent [clip-path:polygon(100%_0,0_0,100%_100%)]

tags.rgb_animated: inline-flex bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FF1E1E] via-[#00C2FF] to-[#FF1E1E] bg-[length:200%_auto] animate-[gradient_3s_linear_infinite] text-white text-[10px] font-black px-3 py-1 uppercase tracking-wider [clip-path:polygon(5px_0,100%_0,calc(100%-5px)_100%,0_100%)]

inputs.text: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/20 text-white rounded-none px-4 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#00C2FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00C2FF] transition-all font-rajdhani

Casa.description: Home page with high-speed racing vibe.
elements: Massive 'NsRacing' title with split red/blue neon glow
Introduction text with fast entry animations
Grid of 15 video cards (3x5 or 4x4 responsive)
Hover states ignite a blue neon border
Gold/Silver/Bronze metallic accents mixed with neon
Token packages visually represented with racing symbols (flags, wheels)
10h free token claim button with digital countdown timer
Rankings by tag tier and hours played
Lateral right list for Top 3 members
Detailed rows with user avatars and RGB tags

Header.top_stats_bar: Registered members count, Online players, Top 10 hours rank ticker
Header.main_nav: Centered menu links, NsRacing Logo (neon glowing)

motion_and_effects.global_transitions: Fast, mechanical ease-out transitions (100ms-200ms) to simulate race car gear shifts. No slow, floaty animations.
motion_and_effects.scanlines_css: background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255,255,255,0), rgba(255,255,255,0) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2)); background-size: 100% 4px;

technical_instructions.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-button').
technical_instructions.fonts_installation: Import Google Fonts 'Orbitron' and 'Rajdhani' in the main index.css file.
technical_instructions.shadcn_overrides: When using Shadcn components (Dialog, Dropdown, Form), override default rounded borders to 'rounded-none' to maintain the sharp, aggressive racing aesthetic.
technical_instructions.icons: Use 'lucide-react' or 'phosphor-react' for sharp, technical icons. Avoid soft, rounded icons.
